ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "epoch_time" TEXT /* Epoch time of data collection in milliseconds */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Formatted timestamp for the data entry */,
  "elapsed_time" REAL /* Elapsed time since the start of data collection in seconds */,
  "x_axis" REAL /* Angular velocity around x-axis */,
  "y_axis" REAL /* Angular velocity around y-axis */,
  "z_axis" REAL /* Angular velocity around z-axis */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot from which the data is collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processing configuration used */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality indicator for the collected data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data collection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "robot_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the robot */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the robot operates */,
  "date_acquired" TEXT /* Date the robot was acquired */,
  "robot_type" TEXT /* Type of robot (e.g., manufacturing, service) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner or department of the robot */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Scheduled maintenance date for the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., gyroscope, accelerometer) */,
  "range" REAL /* Operational range of the sensor */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy rating of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for processing configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the processing configuration */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for processing the data */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., anomaly detection, trend analysis) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational log entry */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot being logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, idle, error) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the operational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_operations_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration took place */,
  "calibration_details" TEXT /* Details about the calibration process */,
  "calibration_result" REAL /* Result of the calibration (e.g., accuracy rating) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold breach, anomaly detected) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing analysis results */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES data_analysis ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_details" TEXT /* Details about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_maintenance_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)
